title: How Alex Hormozi ACTUALLY Uses AI
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down how Alex Hormozi uses AI to run his businesses through a four-pillar system: data as moat, voice first before AI, breaking up workflows, and compound effects. The analysis includes a cautionary example where Hormozi's teams made mistakes that required company-wide correction by his wife Leila, CEO of Acquisition.com.
